name: sos2526-18
description: Project focused on cereal productions, food supply utilization and cost of healthy diet

scripts.test: newman run tests/test-cereal-productions.json -e tests/local.json && npx newman run tests/test-cost-of-healthy-diet-by-countries.json -e tests/local.json && npx newman run tests/test-food-supply-utilization-accounts.json -e tests/local.json

author: Jose Luis Alcon Del Villar, Manuel Castro Sanchez, Nazaret Villalba Delgado
